channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Beef prices in focus as Trump signs order aimed at consumer relief
item.description: President Trump signed an executive order to boost beef imports from Argentina in a move that aims to lower soaring ground beef and steak prices for c...

item.title: ‘Escape From Tarkov’ Adds ‘Duckov’ Crossover With New Quest And Items
item.description: The much anticipated Escape From Tarkov and Escape From Duckov crossover is finally here with a new quest and a special Duckov themed item.

item.title: Jennifer Garner’s Once Upon a Farm IPO jumps 40% as the company raises $198 million
item.description: Once Upon a Farm started trading on the New York Stock Exchange Friday.

item.title: Scott Galloway on why that Anthropic Super Bowl ad got under Sam Altman’s skin and exposed ‘therapy’ as the AI use case
item.description: The marketing guru and host of Prof G Markets said the ad was a “seminal moment” in the AI wars and will lead to Anthropic being more valuable than Op...

item.title: The man who fixed Walmart’s grocery business was just appointed CEO of Kroger
item.description: Former Walmart U.S. chief Greg Foran is just the direct, no-nonsense CEO the supermarket chain urgently needs.

item.title: ‘Every fight I have ever been in, I’ve won’: British PM Starmer vows to fight for his job after Epstein links sack cabinet
item.description: Starmer apologized to Epstein's victims last week and said he was sorry for “having believed Mandelson’s lies.”

item.title: WWE Raw February 9, 2026: Location, Start Time, How To Watch And Confirmed Card
item.description: Find out where WWE Raw is tonight, what time it starts, how to watch, and every confirmed match for the February 9, 2026 episode from Cleveland.

item.title: ‘Goldens In Golden’ Draws Record 5,500 Golden Retrievers To Colorado
item.description: The annual “Goldens in Golden” event in Golden, Colorado, drew visitors from 44 U.S. states to celebrate International Golden Retriever Day with free ...

item.title: The Trump family’s crypto portfolio is getting battered with the rest of the industry—but Melania’s memecoin has fared surprisingly well
item.description: A recent collapse in the price of Bitcoin has spurred weakness across the sector.

item.title: The Real Debate Snowden Sparked—And Why It’s Still Unresolved
item.description: A nuanced look at Snowden’s disclosures, Chris Inglis’s perspective, metadata myths, and why future uses of surveillance powers still demand scrutiny.

item.title: New IEA Data On Electricity Demand - What CEOs And Investors Need To Know
item.description: New IEA data shows electricity demand is entering a new phase. It is now the core growth opportunity for CEOs and investors.

item.title: Alphabet’s $15 billion bond deal may have a highly unusual component
U.S. stocks close higher, as tech fuels gains for Nasdaq while Dow logs record
Why SpaceX is putting a ‘self-growing’ city on the moon over Musk’s Mars dreams
Nasdaq up sharply into final hour, S&P 500 and Dow also climbing — follow live
We’re headed for a partial government shutdown at the end of the week
Super Bowl LX players lose thousands to California's 'jock tax' on athlete income
item.description: Players competing in Super Bowl LX in Santa Clara will face California's jock tax, which subjects players to taxes for days spent in the state prepari...

item.title: Why medals at the 2026 Winter Olympics are worth more than ever
item.description: Gold and silver prices are soaring to new highs, driving 2026 Winter Olympics medal values to historic levels during the Milan Cortina games.

item.title: January layoffs rose to the highest level for the month since 2009
item.description: Major employers including UPS and Amazon announced significant job cuts in January, with transportation and tech sectors leading the nationwide layoff...

item.title: Mortgage rates tick higher but remain near 6%
item.description: The average rate on a 30-year fixed mortgage rose this week to 6.11%, according to the latest Freddie Mac data released Thursday. That is up from last...

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
